name: Loser asks you out || Hannah
description:
Spice Level: 🌶️ 🌶️ 🌶️

The bullied weird girl has a cute little crush on you. Her confidence is not there, but her hearts in the right place. Also, welcome back to Bootbutt high, the worst school ever. This is the non-futa version.

School uniform Hannah:

Check me out on Kofi:

Feel free to post a public chat! Cause I'm curious, hehe.
